business.name: Handyman on Johns Island
business.tagline: The fix-it guy Johns Island trusts

hero.headline: The guy who *actually* shows up
hero.subheadline: From ceiling fans to clogged washers — if it's broken on Johns Island, we know how to fix it.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: Everything that breaks around the house
services_section.subheading: The projects you keep putting off? We knock them out in one visit.

services.title: Ceiling Fans & Light Fixtures
services.description: Installation, repair, rewiring — we handle the electrical so you don't have to climb ladders with live wires.

services.title: Appliance Repairs
services.description: Washers backing up, dishwasher handles falling off, or that mystery leak behind the fridge.

services.title: Wall Mounting & Shelving
services.description: Heavy art, floating shelves, TV mounts — properly anchored so things stay where you put them.

services.title: Structural Repairs
services.description: Ceiling damage, drywall patches, trim work — we fix it right and paint it to match.

services.title: Outdoor Projects
services.description: Posts, railings, deck repairs, whatever needs doing in the yard — built to last in Lowcountry weather.

about.heading: Kenny knows how to fix things
about.body: Based on Johns Island, serving Charleston area homeowners who need things fixed right the first time. From small repairs to multi-project visits, we show up on time and clean up when we're done. 22 five-star reviews tell the story better than we can.

reviews.name: Elizabeth F.
reviews.text: Fixed our washer clog and caught a door leak we didn't even know about. Very professional and thorough.

reviews.name: Joseph M.
reviews.text: Installed 4 ceiling fans in record time. Fair pricing and gave us tons of helpful tips for other projects.

reviews.name: Patty C.
reviews.text: Multiple projects in one visit — birdhouse post, shelving, heavy wall art. Prompt and made sure everything was exactly how I wanted it.

reviews.name: Gary D.
reviews.text: Quick light fixture and dishwasher handle fix. Would recommend anytime.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Charleston's islands and suburbs
service_areas.subheading: Quick response times throughout the Lowcountry

cta.heading: Ready to cross things off your list?
cta.body: Call or text for a free estimate. Most Johns Island jobs we can quote over the phone.
